message:
refactor(browser): modularize client into ~500-line modules

Split 5 large files (12,000+ lines total) into 27 focused modules:

- executor.js (3,571 → 567 + 6 modules): filters, aggregates, window, search, subquery, utils
- remote-file.js (1,812 → 378 + 5 modules): meta, proto, numeric, string, vector
- lance-data.js (1,665 → 16 + 4 modules): base, frame, render, sqljs
- remote-dataset.js (1,520 → 820 + 4 modules): del, frag, search, sql
- lance-database.js (1,501 → 419 + 3 modules): joins, memory, optimizer

Also adds singleton exports for gpuSorter, statisticsManager, opfsStorage.
